wine_bars.name: L'Un des Sens
wine_bars.wine_program: More than 450 natural-leaning wines from across France and Europe, with a deep Alsace by-the-glass list run by chef Romain Leichtweis and Manon, paired with tapas and seasonal share plates
wine_bars.description: Natural-wine cave a manger on Rue Berthe Molly run by chef Romain Leichtweis and Manon. Around 450 bottles, 180 by-the-glass references and Michelin-trained share plates.

wine_bars.name: Le Cercle des Aromes
wine_bars.wine_program: More than 200 wines by the glass with a strong Alsace backbone, including Grand Cru and biodynamic growers, paired with sharing plates of cheese, charcuterie and seasonal small plates
wine_bars.description: Wine bar on Rue Schongauer pouring more than 200 wines by the glass with a deep Alsace selection. Run by sommeliers focused on grower-direct and biodynamic Alsace producers.

wine_bars.name: Cafe des Marchands
wine_bars.wine_program: Wine and craft beer bar with a curated Alsace by-the-glass selection of Riesling, Pinot Gris and Pinot Noir alongside cheese and charcuterie boards on a quiet pedestrian terrace
wine_bars.description: Wine and beer bar in a half-timbered house on pedestrian Rue des Marchands, opposite the Maison Pfister. Quiet terrace with Alsace-focused glass list and French sharing plates.

wine_bars.name: Black and Wine
wine_bars.wine_program: Hotel Hannong wine bar with French-focused list weighted to Alsace plus a curated European and southern hemisphere selection, served alongside cheese, charcuterie and small plates
wine_bars.description: Lounge wine bar in the Hannong Hotel near Place Kleber pouring French and Alsace-focused wines by the glass, with cheese and charcuterie planks under a glazed-roof terrace.

wine_bars.name: Vino Strada
wine_bars.address: 8 Rue du Temple Neuf, 67000 Strasbourg, France
wine_bars.wine_program: Bistronomic restaurant and caviste with a cellar of more than 4,000 wines and spirits focused on artisan growers working organic, biodynamic and natural; deep Alsace by-the-glass list
wine_bars.description: Caviste-restaurant near the cathedral with a 4,000-bottle cellar focused on organic and biodynamic growers. Sit-down tastings, share plates and small-batch Alsace by the glass.

wine_bars.name: Oenosphere
wine_bars.address: 10 Rue de la Krutenau, 67000 Strasbourg, France
wine_bars.wine_program: Wine shop, wine bar and tasting room in Krutenau, deep focus on natural, organic and biodynamic growers from Alsace and across France, with tasting workshops and weekly producer visits
wine_bars.description: Krutenau caviste and bar a vin focused on natural and biodynamic growers. Weekly producer tastings, by-the-glass flights and a tight Alsace-led list.

wine_bars.name: L'Epicurien
wine_bars.wine_program: Bistro wine list weighted to Alsace whites, French crus and Champagne, paired with a market-driven menu built around carpaccio and seasonal meat
wine_bars.description: Convivial bistro near Place Kleber known for its all-you-can-eat carpaccio and a tight French wine list weighted to Alsace whites, Champagnes and Cremants.

wine_bars.name: L'Assiette du Vin
wine_bars.wine_program: Bistronomy and wine bar run by Philippe Roth, with an Alsace and Loire-focused list of grower-direct and biodynamic bottles served alongside small homemade share plates
wine_bars.description: Schiltigheim bistro-cave near the Strasbourg ring, Philippe Roth's wine list leans Alsace and Loire growers, paired with seasonal home-made small plates.

wine_bars.name: Maison Zimmer
wine_bars.address: 33 Rue du General de Gaulle, 68340 Riquewihr, France
wine_bars.wine_program: Estate-owned 16th-century cellar tasting bar with three-wine commented tastings of the Zimmer range plus a Winstub Au Tire-Bouchon serving Alsace classics with the same wine list
wine_bars.description: Family producer on the main street of Riquewihr with a 16th-century vaulted cellar, commented tastings of Schoenenbourg Riesling and the Winstub Au Tire-Bouchon next door.

verified.address_quoted: 33 rue du General de Gaulle, Riquewihr

wine_bars.name: Bistrot des Lavandieres
wine_bars.wine_program: French bistro wine list weighted to organic and Alsace growers, plus a wide selection of regional bottles and organic Alsace beers, paired with Florence Di Foggia's bistromic plates
wine_bars.description: Bistro on Rue Saint-Jean facing Place des Six Montagnes Noires, Florence Di Foggia plates bistromic French cooking and pours an organic-leaning Alsace and French regional wine list.

wine_bars.name: Wolfberger Tasting Room Strasbourg
wine_bars.wine_program: Wolfberger cooperative's urban Strasbourg outpost, by-the-glass and bottle tastings of the Grand Cru range, Cremant flight and eaux-de-vie pairings, with cheese plates
wine_bars.description: Wolfberger's urban tasting boutique a minute from the cathedral, pouring Cremant flights, Grand Cru Rieslings and eau-de-vie pairings from the Eguisheim cooperative.
